title: Lowchesh #3873
definition:
Hallohesh = "whisperer"

 1) father of a chief of Jerusalem after the exile who sealed the
    covenant with Nehemiah
nasbUsage:
Definition: Hallohesh = "whisperer"

 1) father of a chief of Jerusalem after the exile who sealed the
    covenant with Nehemiah

    NASB:  whisperer, a leader in Isr.
